creator: mohacsi@ik.bme.hu
text:
ata0,ata1 devices appeared in visual config in miscelaneous category,
  	not in 	the mass storage devices. 
	This can be embrarassing.

Fix: 

/sys/i386/i386/userconfig.c should contain "ata" beside the "wd"
How-To-Repeat: 
	Boot FreeBSD 4.0-20000214-CURRENT and jump to visual config
